ERROR   [TC-E-001] module grid_types <-> header.h  struct grid_params
  STRUCT_LAYOUT: Field 'tolerance' offset mismatch.
    Fortran BIND(C): offset=8 (natural alignment, 7 bytes padding after 'method')
    C #pragma pack(1): offset=1 (packed, no padding)
  Total struct size: Fortran=32 bytes, C=21 bytes.
  Every field after 'method' reads from wrong address. Silent corruption.

WARNING [TC-E-001] header.h:2
  PACKED_STRUCT: #pragma pack(1) detected on interop struct. Packed C structs
  are rarely compatible with Fortran BIND(C) natural alignment.
